title: Event Project Manager
description:
Are you passionate about event marketing and excited by the idea of creating impactful experiences across Asia? Our client is a leading event marketing agency and they are looking for an Event Project Manager to join the Singapore team. 

In this role, you will play a pivotal role in planning and delivering a wide range of events across Asia including conferences, meetings, award galas, product launches and incentive programmes. You will be involved in new business pitches and proposal development as well.

Responsibilities:

  • Act as the main point of contact for clients and manage projects end-to-end

  • Lead and guide internal teams to deliver seamless event execution

  • Coordinate with suppliers and partners (venues, AV, designers, production houses, agencies, government bodies, etc.)

  • Manage registrations and RSVPs where required

  • Prepare client meeting agendas, minutes, reports, proposals, budgets, and timelines

  • Participate in new business pitches, brainstorming sessions, and presentations

  • Handle project paperwork including contracts, invoicing, and final budgets

  • Support other agency-related tasks as needed

Your Experience:

  • Bachelors Degree

  • Minimum 3-4 years’ experience in events, marketing or event production.

  • Excellent client management and interpersonal skills

  • Highly organised, adaptable, and calm under pressure

  • Proficient in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint (design software knowledge is a bonus)

  • Passionate about events and marketing

  • An excellent communicator

If you are interested in this role, we would love to hear from you! Please send your most up to date CV, and we will be in touch should the role be suitable.

EA License No.: R1114955

Agency License No.: 11C4388

postedCompany.description:
Aspire specialises in recruiting for the media and marketing communications industry. We help change people's lives and improve business performance.

We have a 96% success rate of placing the right people into the right role. We act as both a brand embassador for our employer customers, and a trusted recruitment partner for our candidates. We are a 'high touch' consultancy who believes in meeting face to face in order to fully understand your requirements, whether it is hiring new staff or looking for the next career move.

Established since 1992, Aspire has over two decades of heritage in our specialist areas, so our dedicated consltas are well positioned to help.

Aspire has developed an international presence with offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, London and Manchester for employers and individuals with global aspirations. Aspire has been operating in Asia since November 2011, facilitating the movement of talent, locally, regionally and at a global level. Aspire is also ISO 9001 accredited, an investors in People Gold Award Company, a Sunday Times Top 100 company to work, members of APSCo Asia and we are always interested in talking to media & marketing communications professionals as well as those who are considering a career in recruitment with us at Aspire.
postedCompany.name: ASPIRE GLOBAL NETWORK PTE. LTD.
